Get Involved

Join our community and help shape the future of AI in Hampton Roads

Volunteer

Help organize events, mentor newcomers, or contribute to community projects. We welcome volunteers of all skill levels.

  • Event planning and coordination
  • Content creation and social media
  • Technical mentorship
  • Community outreach
Apply to Volunteer

Speak at Events

Share your knowledge and experience with the community through talks, workshops, or panel discussions.

  • Technical presentations
  • Workshop facilitation
  • Panel discussions
  • Lightning talks
Propose a Talk

Sponsor

Support our mission by sponsoring events, providing venues, or contributing resources to help our community grow.

  • Event sponsorship
  • Venue hosting
  • Equipment and resources
  • Student scholarships
Become a Sponsor

Join Projects

Collaborate on community-driven AI projects and initiatives. Learn by doing alongside other AI enthusiasts.

  • Open source contributions
  • Research collaborations
  • Hackathons and competitions
  • Community challenges
Explore Projects

Questions?

Reach out to us at info@aichamptonroads.org
